commands: python3 scripts/build_launch_digest.py --release-notes data/release_notes_may.md --faq data/customer_faq.md --limitations data/known_limitations.md --format-guide reference/digest_format.md --audience-notes reference/audience_notes.md --output results/launch_digest.md
workflows.label: Draft digest
workflows.summary: Builds the Customer Success digest from the May launch source packet.

workflows.label: Customer-ready digest
notes: Applies the launch-note formatting bundle used by the publishing team.
Leaves the validated Customer Success digest at the requested results path.
workflows.summary: Recommended one-command workflow for final customer-facing launch digests.
